verses.text: Tua laitakin Jerusalem panin a hong pai Farisi mite leh Thukham hilh siate, Jesuh kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi
A nungzuite pawlkhat in khanglui ngeina zuiloin, khut silloin an a neklam uh a mukha uh hi
(Farisi mite leh Jew mite khempeuh in khanglui ngeina zui-in khut silloin an nelo uh hi

Nektheih zuakna panin a kilei nate zong amau teek mah in a sawp kei uh leh nelo uh hi. Khanglui ngeina a zuih uh, hai khawng, beel khawng, sumngo kibawl beellekuang khawngte sawp ding cih ngeina a zuih uh tampi om hi

Tua ahih manin Farisi mite leh Thukham hilh siate in Jesuh kiangah, “Bang hangin na nungzuite in, khanglui laipek panin tuni dongin a kizui pulepa ngeinate zuiloin, khut silloin an ne ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi

Jesuh in amaute dawng a, “A tungthama a hoihin a kilangkhem note' thu, Isaiah in a genkholhna man mahmah hi. Ama genna-ah, ‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Hih mite in a kampi bek uh tawh kei hong zahtakbawl uh a, a lungsim taktak uh kei tawh kigamla hi
Mihingte' bawltawm thukhamte, Pasian' thukham zahin mite tungah hilh uh ahih manin, kei hong biak hangun a kiman'na om lo hi,’ ci hi
Note in Pasian' thukham nawlkhinin, mihingte' thuhilhna na zui zawsop uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in a thugen zomlai a, “Na khanglui ngeina uh na zuihtheihna dingun Pasian' thukhamte a nawlkhinzia na siam mahmah uh hi
Moses in, ‘Na nu leh na pa zahtak un. A nu a pa a samsiate kithat hen,’ ci hi
Ahi zongin note in, ‘Mi khatpeuh in a nu a pa a piaktheih ding na khat peuhpeuh a neih hangin, hih pen korban (Pasian-a' ding) hi, ci peuh leh
a nu leh a pa a huhna ding panin suakta thei hi,’ ci-in thu na hilh uh hi
Hih bang danin mite thu na hilhna uh tawh Pasian' thu na pampaih uh hi. Hih bangzia-in na gamtatna uh adang tampi zong omlai hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in mihonpite samin amaute kiangah, “Mi khempeuh aw, ka thugen hong ngai un la, ka thugente theitel un
A pualam panin mite sungah tumin mi a ninsakthei bangmah omlo hi. Ahi zongin mite sung panin a pusuak khiate in mi ninsakthei hi
(Zakna ding bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” a ci hi
Mihonpite nusia-in innsungah a lut khit ciangin a nungzuite in hih thugentehna thu a dong uh hi
Jesuh in, “Note in zong bangmah a theilo himawk hilo na hi uh hiam? A pualam panin mite sungah a tum nate in mi ninsak theilo hi
A lungsimah tumloin a gilsung bekah tum ahih manin tua panin kithakhia lel hi. (Hih bang a gen ciangin an khempeuh nek dingin a siangtho ahi hi, ci-in Jesuh in a gen ahi hi
Mihingte sung panin a pusuak khiate in mihing ninsak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte' lungsim sung panin nungak-tangval mawhnopna, guktakna, mi thahna, zilepasal neisate tawh mawhnopna
huaihamna, gitlohna, khemna, gamtat hoihlohna, en'na, mi gensiatna, kisialhna, leh haitatna a piangsakthei ngaihsutna hoihlote khempeuh
mihingte sung panin pusuakin mite ninsak ahihlam theilo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Syria gam Foenisia khuami Numei' Upna

verses.text: Tua lai panin Jesuh dingkhia-in Taia khuakiim gamah a pai hi. Inn khat sungah lut a, kuamah in a theihloh ding a ut hangin a busim thei kei hi
A tanu dawi a vei nupi khat in Jesuh' thu a zak ciangin hong pai-in ama khe phungah hong bok hi
Tua nupi pen Grik mi hi a, Syria gam Foenisia khua-a a suak ahi hi. A tanu sung panin dawi a hawlkhiatsakna dingin a hong thum hi
Ahih hangin Jesuh in, “Naupangte an nesak masa ni. Naupangte' nekding kimlai ui khawite piak masak ding kilawmlo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Ahi zongin nupi in, “Hi mah hi, Topa aw; sabuai nuai-a uite in naupangte' khamvalteng ngahbuang hilo ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin
Jesuh in nupi kiangah, “Hih banga na kampauna hangin na inn-ah ciah ta in; na tanu sung panin dawi a paikhiazo hi,” a ci hi
Amah zong a inn-ah ciahpah a, a tanu nuamtakin lum hithiatin a om mu ahih manin dawi a paikhiat khitna thu a thei hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Bilngongin a Paumawl Mi khat Damsak

verses.text: Tua ciangin Taia khuakiim gam panin Jesuh paikhia a, Sidon khuapi nawkin pai a, Khuapi Sawmte gam lam tawnin Galilee Tuili-ah a tung hi
Mi pawlkhat in a bilngongin a pau theilo mi khat, Jesuh kiangah hong paipih uh a, ama tungah a khut a ngaksakna dingin a thum uh hi
Jesuh in zong mihonte omna panin tua mipa paikhiatpih a, a mipa' bilte gel sungah a khutmete guang a, tua ciangin a khutmete cil nuhin a leii lawn'sakin
vantung lam ento a, khuisa-in, “Kihong in,” a cihnopna ahi “ Effatha” a ci hi
Thakhatin a mipa' bil kihongin, a leii zong hong kol a, nuamtakin a pauthei hi
Kuama kiangah hih thute a genlohna dingun Jesuh in kham a, ahi zongin nakkham leh nakgen semsem zawsop uh hi
Amaute in genzawhloh dongin lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Hih mipa in septheihloh bangmah neilo hi. Bilngongte nangawn khua zasak thei a, a pau theilote nangawn pau theisak hi,” a ci uh hi.
